title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Hyatt India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Hyatt India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Reservation Manager with drive and ambition, Hyatt India in Faridabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hyatt India:
Hyatt India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hyatt India!
